message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Jugador" as Jugador
participant "Telegram" as Telegram
participant "Gestor" as Gestor
participant "Ranking" as Ranking
participant "User" as User
participant "Timer" as Timer
participant "Options" as Options

note right of Gestor
ref
Desplacar-se per l'escenari()
end note

note right of Gestor
Emmagatzemar Ranking
AddtoRanking(User)
return(bool)
end note

note right of Gestor
Mostrar Ranking
FiveFirstRanking()
return(bool)
printRanking()
return(bool)
end note

Jugador ->> Telegram: Seleccionar_opcio()
Telegram ->> Gestor: Realitzar_jugada(self, bot, update)
Gestor ->> User: GetTimer()
User ->> Gestor: return(timer)
Gestor ->> Timer: RestarSeg()
Timer ->> Gestor: Return(bool)
Gestor ->> Options: get_texts(ind)
Options ->> Gestor: Return(String)
Gestor ->> Options: get_options(ind)
Options ->> Gestor: Return(String)
Gestor ->> Options: get_realitzar_mod(ind)
Options ->> Gestor: Return(String)
Gestor ->> Jugador: Return(String)
Jugador ->> Telegram: Return(String)

@enduml
